TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tjadukudukung, title = Tjadukudukung, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjadukudukung} }

S.FORM: Tjadukudukung Itiniay i Manzhou Cen no Pingtung ko Tjadukudukung a niyaro', 235 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 663 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 62% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 413 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 38% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 250 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan59%, Amis2%, Rukai1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjaɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~uŋ itiniaj i man*ħo~uo~u~u ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u tjaɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, amis*%, ro~u~ukai*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tjadukudukung Itiniay i Manzhou Cen no Pingtung ko Tjadukudukung a niyaro', 235 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 663 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 62% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 413 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 38% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 250 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan59%, Amis2%, Rukai1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjaɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~uŋ itiniaj i man*ħo~uo~u~u ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u tjaɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uko~u~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, amis*%, ro~u~ukai*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
